docs/AGENTS.md:
# Prime Lab Workspace

Use Prime Lab controls for choosing environments, editing configs, launching runs, and inspecting results. Keep generated outputs out of commits.
docs/CLAUDE.md:
# Claude Guidance

This workspace is prepared for Prime Lab. Prefer native Lab tools and local configs over ad hoc shell instructions.
docs/environments/AGENTS.md:
# Environment Sources

Environment source directories should include package metadata and a README. Do not commit generated outputs, build artifacts, or caches.
skills/create-environments/SKILL.md:
---
name: create-environments
description: Create Prime-compatible verifiers environments.
---

# Create Environments

Help the user create a small, testable verifiers environment with clear package metadata and examples.
skills/browse-environments/SKILL.md:
---
name: browse-environments
description: Browse local and hosted Prime environments.
---

# Browse Environments

Use Lab context to inspect available environments, versions, and local source directories.
skills/review-environments/SKILL.md:
---
name: review-environments
description: Review Prime environment source for readiness.
---

# Review Environments

Check environment source for packaging, README quality, tests, and generated artifacts.
skills/evaluate-environments/SKILL.md:
---
name: evaluate-environments
description: Prepare and inspect Prime evaluation configs.
---

# Evaluate Environments

Use Lab controls to edit evaluation configs, preview launches, and inspect outputs.
---
name: optimize-with-environments
description: Optimize prompts or policies with Prime environments.
---

# Optimize With Environments

Use local configs and Lab results to iterate on environment-driven optimization workflows.
skills/train-with-environments/SKILL.md:
---
name: train-with-environments
description: Prepare Prime hosted training configs.

# Train With Environments

Use Lab controls for training config edits, previews, launches, logs, and run inspection.
skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md:
---
name: brainstorm
description: Brainstorm Lab workflows with environment context.
---

# Brainstorm

Help shape environment, evaluation, and training workflows before implementation.
skills/lab-widgets/SKILL.md:
---
name: lab-widgets
description: Use inside Prime Intellect Lab when choosing, editing, launching, inspecting, syncing, or confirming Lab objects.
metadata:
  short-description: Use native Lab controls for research actions
---

# Lab Controls

You are assisting a user from inside the Prime Intellect Lab TUI. Prefer native Lab controls for choosing environments, editing configs, previewing actions, launching runs, inspecting rollouts, and showing diffs. Keep prose short and product-facing.
configs/endpoints.toml:
# Prime Lab endpoint examples

[openai]
api_base_url = "https://api.openai.com/v1"
api_key_var = "OPENAI_API_KEY"
configs/eval/minimal.toml:
model = "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"
save_results = true

[[eval]]
env_id = "primeintellect/gsm8k"
version = "0.1.0"
num_examples = 5
rollouts_per_example = 1

[eval.sampling_args]
max_tokens = 512
configs/eval/multi-env.toml:
model = "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"
save_results = true

[[eval]]
env_id = "primeintellect/gsm8k"
version = "0.1.0"
num_examples = 5
rollouts_per_example = 1

[[eval]]
env_id = "primeintellect/wordle"
version = "0.1.0"
num_examples = 5
rollouts_per_example = 1
configs/rl/alphabet-sort.toml:
model = "openai/gpt-oss-20b"
max_steps = 100
batch_size = 256
rollouts_per_example = 8

[sampling]
max_tokens = 512

[[env]]
id = "primeintellect/alphabet-sort"
version = "0.1.0"
configs/rl/gsm8k.toml:
model = "openai/gpt-oss-20b"
max_steps = 100
batch_size = 256
rollouts_per_example = 8

[sampling]
max_tokens = 512

[[env]]
id = "primeintellect/gsm8k"
